who: procurement directors in mid-sized manufacturing companies processing 10-20 purchase requisitions/week
offer: For procurement directors in mid-sized manufacturing companies processing 10-20 invoices/week, inefficient tracking causes late orders. We extract and consolidate purchase requisition data instead of manual tracking and reporting via spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient tracking and reporting of purchase requisition data.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement directors seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on similar procurement challenges
DM outreach to procurement directors with demo video links
Engage in community forums for procurement tools and tips
try_it: Let users try Weekly email summaries and Manual data entry for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing requisition data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
